meaning: n.水闸,泄水v.开闸放水,流出,冲洗,奔泻
examples: Farmers in Phichit Province, among others, fought over the maintenance of sandbag barriers and sluice gates.
Yu and his colleagues are dispatched to sluice gates during times of drought.
Experts believe that this sediment will build up behind the dam, with only an unproven system of sluice gates to release it.
If one piano teacher has too many students, she might sluice the spillover to you.
In 2002, the secretaries of interior and agriculture came in person to reopen the sluice gates.
